title: Tool card component with collapsible content and status indicators
purpose: Displays tool execution information in a collapsible card format with status badges and optional duration tracking.
module_context: Exports a React functional component ToolCardFrame that accepts various props including name, title, status, and children. Defines helper functions for formatting duration and mapping status to CSS classes and labels.

steps.content: Convert milliseconds to a human-readable string.
IF the duration is less than 1000 milliseconds, return the rounded value with 'ms' suffix.
ELSE divide by 1000, round to one decimal place, and return with 's' suffix.
Initialize the collapsed state based on the defaultCollapsed prop.
Construct the CSS classes for the card element including conditional styling for historical items.
Render a button that toggles the collapsed state when clicked.
Display the tool name, status badge, title, and duration within the button.
IF the card is not collapsed, render the children content within a nested div.
